Alist_v1: This standard digit DP approach is complex to implement iteratively without recursion.
We need a helper function or careful loop structure.
This is too complex to implement quickly and correctly.
This confirms the complexity of the manual counting. The standard Digit DP structure is the most robust way.
The standard approach is usually implemented by iterating through the digits and calculating contributions based on the prefix.
Alist_v2: We iterate through the positions i (from 0 to L-1). Let P be the prefix S[0...i-1]. Let d = S[i] (the digit at position i). Let R be the remaining part of N (suffix S[i+1...L-1]).
Case 2: Counting occurrences in numbers with the same number of digits as N, but smaller prefixes.
We will use a helper function or loop to calculate the count.
We iterate i from 0 to L-1 (position index). Let P be the prefix S[0...i-1]. Let d = S[i] (the digit at position i). Let R be the remaining part of N (suffix S[i+1...L-1]).
Blist:
Decomposition of n:
   - For a given P, the digit at this position is: d = (n / P) % 10.
   - The part of the number higher than P is the "prefix": high = n / (P * 10).
   - The part of the number lower than P is the "suffix": low = n % P.

Counting Logic for Position P:
   - A. Full Cycles Contribution:
     The higher digits (prefix) represent how many full cycles of (P * 10) have been completed.
     In each full cycle, the digit '1' appears exactly P times at the current position.
     Contribution = high * P.

Case 1: d > 1
       The current digit has already passed '1'. This means '1' appeared for its full duration at this position in the current cycle.
       Contribution = P.
     - Case 2: d == 1
       The current digit is exactly '1'. The number of '1's depends on how far the suffix has progressed.
       The numbers go from (prefix...100) to (prefix...1[low]).
       Contribution = low + 1.
     - Case 3: d < 1 (d == 0)
       The current digit hasn't reached '1' yet.
       Contribution = 0.
Loop from P = 1, multiplying by 10 each iteration, until P > n.

_comment.Alist_v1: A 侧「迷路」混沌期的典型句子（混乱、退缩、认为复杂度高）
_comment.Alist_v2: A 侧在字符串 Digit DP 里打转的句子（试图做 prefix/digit/suffix 分解但用了错误的方式——字符串下标）
_comment.Blist: B 侧清晰正确的数位 DP 分解（high/digit/low 基于纯数学运算）
_comment.A_pivot_window: A 侧 cotton 内唯一「顿悟」转折点，用于捕获转折前后的神经元变化
_comment.usage: 把 Alist_v1 和 Alist_v2 都跑一遍 blockwise 探针，分别与 Blist 做跨侧差分，两组差分取并集就是「B 专属的清晰推理神经元」
